videos.title: This one simple trick destroys Standard
videos.description:
This Dimir tempo BO1 Faeries deck uses Spell Stutter and Faebloom Trick to keep opponents off balance on Standard BO1 mythic ladder.

Decklist - https://www.moxfield.com/decks/_LMnx7PScUiVh-w9mLo-UQ
